creator: chifeng@gmail.com
text:
Please commit, thank you.

On Fri, Jul 13, 2012 at 7:30 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/p5-Net-IMAP-Server,
>
> Please note that PR ports/169824 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/169824
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

*Regards.*
